message:
bd-251: Fix clippy warnings in sqlmodel-mysql test code

- Move helper function to module level (items_after_statements)
- Replace PI/E approximations with non-constant values (approx_constant)
- Add digit separators to numeric literals (unreadable_literal)
- Fix inconsistent digit grouping in timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
